message:
refactor(web): extract helpers to deduplicate binary message building

- Add MuxClient.buildEnvelope() for [type][serverId][payload] pattern
- Add MuxClient.frameWithFlag() for zstd frame wrapping (4 call sites)
- Add MuxClient.u32Bytes() for simple uint32 messages (3 call sites)
- Deduplicate sendPanelMsg/sendPanelMsgImmediate pair
- Deduplicate sendPanelInputViaControl/Immediate pair
